feed.title: MSFS Blog
feed.subtitle: Development updates of Microsoft Flight Simulator.

entry.title: Creator Highlight, January 2026 – CowTown
entry.summary: We’re continuing our Creator Highlight series in 2026 and are starting the new year in style, featuring popular YouTuber CowTown! Having started content creation a decade ago, CowTown (Tim) has switched his focus to Microsoft Flight Simulator in recent years. Sitting at just shy of 50’000 subscribers, Tim’s passion for our community shines through in … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, February 2026 – FlyWithLado
entry.summary: For our February Creator Highlight, we’re focusing on popular video creator FlyWithLado! Having amassed a ginormous following of over 540,000 Instagram users and many more on different platforms, FlyWithLado is redefining content creation for social media in our community.We asked them some questions to give you all a behind the scenes look at their content:Do … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator at FSExpo 2026
entry.summary: FlightSimExpo 2026 is coming up on June 12-14 from the Saint Paul RiverCentre in St. Paul, MN, USA! For the third time, the Microsoft Flight Simulator team is thrilled to be in attendance.

entry.title: July 9th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapFollowing last week’s release of Sim Update 5.1 and World Update 22: United States National Parks, we are now pleased to begin the Sim Update 6 Pre-Release Public Beta Test. You can find the release notes for the first test build (1.8.5.0) on our forums here. If you would like to participate in this … Continued

entry.title: July 16th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapPublic testing of Sim Update 6 continues with a new beta build (1.8.8.0) today. You can find the full release notes for this build on our forums here. As always, we highly encourage everyone participating in the beta to vote in our surveys at this link. If you are not enrolled in the public beta … Continued

entry.title: July 23rd, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe dev team remains very hard at work on Sim Update 6! In case you missed it, last week we released a new public beta build, version 1.8.8.0. You can read the release notes for this test build on our forums here. As always, we encourage everyone participating in the public beta (available on … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator at FSExpo 2026
entry.summary: FlightSimExpo 2026 is coming up on June 12-14 from the Saint Paul RiverCentre in St. Paul, MN, USA! For the third time, the Microsoft Flight Simulator team is thrilled to be in attendance.

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases Expert Series 02: The Piper M600
entry.summary: The Innovative M600 sets new standards in performance, reliability, and cockpit experience.Distinction and UtilityThe M600 is a 6-seat, single-engine, multi-use light civil airplane developed and manufactured by Piper Aircraft of the United States. Introduced in 2015, the M600 is an advanced member of the Piper M-Class. Boasting a pressurized cabin, state-of-the-art avionics, and luxurious passenger … Continued
